formulas.latex: F^{i} = \sum_{j \neq i}^{m} \begin{Bmatrix} \left(x^{j} - x^{i}\right) \frac{q^{i} q^{j}}{\left\|x^{j} - x^{i}\right\|^{2}} & \text{if} & f \left(x^{j}\right) < f \left(x^{i}\right) \\ \left(x^{i} - x^{j}\right) \frac{q^{i} q^{j}}{\left\|x^{j} - x^{i}\right\|^{2}} & \text{else} & f \left(x^{j}\right) \geq f \left(x^{i}\right) \end{Bmatrix} , \forall i .
